strategy: Attack with Ice (+30%); he resists Fire 60%.
Use school-specific blades like Frostblade, not universal ones such as Elemental Blade, since universal blades get Steal Charmed off the receiver.
Do not put universal traps on him: a universal Trap triggers Immolate on the caster, and Mass Feint counts as universal. Use Ice-specific traps.
Expect his own hits to grow, since he gains a Firespear after every damage spell he casts. Shield up.
Stack Frostblades and a school-specific trap, then finish with a boosted Ice hit and clear the Skirker Buster with the same AoE if possible.
cheatNotes: After he casts any damage spell he gives himself a Firespear, ramping his damage, so keep shields up.
Universal blades get stolen off the receiver, and universal traps on him trigger Immolate on the caster. Use school-specific blades and traps instead.
Mass Feint counts as a universal trap and triggers the Immolate, so use single Ice traps.
